svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="CSA Call Agent Architecture" id="csa-arch-v2"> <mxGraphModel dx="1334" dy="966" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1050" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="CSA Call Agent Architecture Diagram&nbsp;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="380" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agentBoundary" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=14;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=2;fontSize=13;" value="CSA Assistant — one Copilot Studio agent.<br>The skills below run inside it." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="1020" x="450" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="architect" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="Cloud Solution Architect" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="20" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="transcript" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Teams Call Transcript
(uploaded or pasted)
Manual text as fallback" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="230" y="405" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="extract" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Requirement Extraction
(skill)
- Handles corrections
- Flags gaps as "not discussed"" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="220" x="470" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="structured" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Structured Requirements
(workload, scale, compliance,
budget, existing stack)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="750" y="405" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="draft" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Architecture Draft Generation
(skill, grounded via RAG)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="117.5" width="200" x="1010" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aac" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Azure Architecture Center
(RAG knowledge source)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="1010" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proposed" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Proposed Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="1270" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="waf" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="WAF Scoring
(skill)
5 pillars + justification per pillar" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="180" x="1270" y="515" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="Output:<div>Downloadable Scorecard<br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="1250" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="architect" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="transcript"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="transcript" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="extract"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="extract" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="structured"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="structured" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="draft"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="aac" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;dashed=1;" target="draft"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="draft" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="proposed"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="proposed" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="waf"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="waf" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="finalLoop" edge="1" parent="1" source="architect" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#000000;fontStyle=1;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;endArrow=classic;endFill=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="output" value="Agent delivers scorecard, flags capped pillars (Scoring Confidence)
⇄ architect reviews & revises"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0975" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-1" as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="57.5" y="860" /> <mxPoint x="1360" y="860" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop1" edge="1" parent="1" source="structured" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;endArrow=classic;endFill=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="architect" value="Agent delivers requirements, asks about flagged ambiguity
⇄ architect answers, drafting proceeds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="850" y="690" /> <mxPoint x="132.5" y="690" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="160" y="520" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop2" edge="1" parent="1" source="proposed" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;endArrow=classic;endFill=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="architect" value="Agent delivers draft, asks about Design Tensions / Risks Noticed
⇄ architect answers, scoring proceeds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.188" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1315" y="510" /> <mxPoint x="1220" y="510" /> <mxPoint x="1220" y="790" /> <mxPoint x="95" y="790" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="100" y="540" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#666666;" value="Purple boundary = the one CSA Assistant agent; boxes inside are its internal skills and internal outputs.<br>Purple ⇄ = mid-pipeline checkpoint: agent delivers an internal output and asks about anything flagged, in the same turn.<br>Black ⇄ = final scorecard delivered (with its own capped-pillar flags) and the architect's overall review." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="1000" x="20" y="890" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4uZpsywgQ_M762LnOfN1-1" parent="1" style="verticalLabelPosition=bottom;html=1;verticalAlign=top;align=center;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#00BEF2;shape=mxgraph.azure.user;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="20" x="85" div.div:
CSA Assistant — one Copilot Studio agent.
The skills below run inside it.

div.div:
Purple boundary = the one CSA Assistant agent; boxes inside are its internal skills and internal outputs.
Purple ⇄ = mid-pipeline checkpoint: agent delivers an internal output and asks about anything flagged, in the same turn.
Black ⇄ = final scorecard delivered (with its own capped-pillar flags) and the architect's overall review.
